song_name: All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You
version_description: Chords, based on the original studio version. YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OAfxs0IDeMs No capo.

versions.song_name: All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Heart - All I Wanna Do Is Make Love To You (1990)

Based on YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OAfxs0IDeMs

4/4
103 bpm

[Intro]
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D/C[/ch]
| •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   |[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                        [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D/C[/ch]
| •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   | •   •   •   •   |[/tab]

[Verse 1]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]
It was a rainy night, when he came into sight,[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gadd9[/ch]
standing by the road, no umbrella, no coat.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]Bm7[/ch]
So I pulled up along side and I offered him a ride,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]
he accepted with a smile, so we drove for a while.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
I didn't ask him his name, this lonely boy in the rain.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
Fate tell me it's right, is this love at first sight.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Dsus4[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus2[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
Please don't make it wrong, just stay for the night.[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you.    Say you will you want me too.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you.  I've got lovin' arms to hold on to.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]Bm[/ch]
  So we found this hotel, it was a place I knew well.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Gadd9[/ch]
We made magic that night. Oh, he did everything right.[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Bm7[/ch]
He brought the woman out of me, so many times, easily.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]
And in the morning when he woke, all I left him was a note.[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 2]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
I told him I am the flower, you are the seed, we walked in the garden, we planted a tree.[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                                               [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]Dsus4[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Dsus2[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
Don't try to find me, please don't you dare, just live in my memory, you'll always be there.[/tab]

[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you,  one night of love, was all we knew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you,  I've got lovin' arms to hold on to[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
Oh, oooh, we made love, love like strangers.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
All night long,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
we made love...[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
Then it happened one day, we came round the same way.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Cadd9[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]
  You can imagine his surprise, when he saw his own eyes.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
I said please please understand, I'm in love with another man.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
And what he couldn't give me, whohoh, was the one little thing that you can...[/tab]

[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you,  one night of love, was all we knew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I want to do is make love to you, come on, say you will, you want me too.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you,  one night of love, was all we knew.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I want to do is make love to you,    say you will baby, you want me too.[/tab]

[Fading Outro]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All night long,  all night long...[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All night long,  all night long...[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do, all I wanna do, all I wanna do, all I wanna do[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D/G[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]                           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D/C[/ch]
All I wanna do is make love to you,    one night of love, was all we knew. Yeah...[/tab]
